vmtExplanation: Vehicle miles traveled estimates how much traffic is moving through an area by combining road length and traffic volume.

trafficAnalysisDistricts.name: Urban core
trafficAnalysisDistricts.description: Traffic rebounded after 2020, but more slowly than outer growth areas.

trafficAnalysisDistricts.description: The report notes a small VMT decline from 2020 to 2022 in the CBD.
